content: {"pass": false, "issues": [{"problem": "Evidence ledger is empty, but the draft makes multiple substantive assertions about \"market-standard\" NDA practice and risk (e.g., typical term lengths, survival periods, and characterizing the clause as strongly recipient-favorable) without any supporting ledger items.", "fix": "Either add ledger items supporting these market-standard characterizations or rephrase as neutral drafting options without asserting what is typical."}, {"problem": "The SKILL validation checklist items (jurisdiction-specific rules, flow-down for subcontractor agreements, NNN matrix, ratification clause, ADS/Pakistan labour law) are simply listed in the instructions but not addressed or explicitly marked [BLANK]/[TBD] in the draft.", "fix": "Explicitly state that these checklist items are not applicable to this NDA clause or mark them as [TBD]/[BLANK] as required by the checklist."}]}
